Collapse
Me
Me
  1. _RowNumber
  2. ID
  3. Email
  4. Name
  5. Roles
  6. Status
  7. LastEditedOn
  8. LastEditedBy
  9. AccessKey
  10. Photo
  11. RolesList
=AND( [Email] = USEREMAIL(), OR([AccessKey] = "Not in Use", USERSETTINGS("AccessKey") = [AccessKey]), [Status] = "Active" )
READ_ONLY
AppUser
ALWAYS
  1. **auto**
Admin_View
Admin_View
  1. _RowNumber
  2. ID
  3. Type
  4. View
  5. Group
  6. Category
  7. Name
  8. Description
  9. Icon
  10. Link
  11. AllowValues
  12. AllowMultiple
  13. AllowRoles
  14. LastEditBy
  15. LastEditOn
  16. AppLink
=AND( [Type] = "Admin", ISNOTBLANK(INTERSECT([AllowRoles], SPLIT(ANY(Me[Roles]), ","))) )
UPDATES_ONLY
AppViews
ALWAYS
  1. Go to App Link (AppLink)
